item.immersive_aircraft.bamboo_hopper.de: A chonky aircraft with three seats and pontoons to land safely on water.
item.immersive_aircraft.biplane.descript: Fast and rather reliable. Make sure your runway is long enough.
item.immersive_aircraft.bomb_bay.descrip: Drops TNT, does not destroy blocks but deals heavy damage.
item.immersive_aircraft.cargo_airship.de: Slow and fuel hungry but carries an entire storage.
item.immersive_aircraft.gyrodyne.descrip: Muscle-powered copter. Give it a good push and off it flies!
item.immersive_aircraft.heavy_crossbow.d: A heavy crossbow with a powerful punch, requires arrows.
item.immersive_aircraft.quadrocopter.des: Perfect for building, and that's about it.
item.immersive_aircraft.telescope.descri: A bulkier version of the spyglass.
item.immersive_aircraft.warship.descript: A flying fortress, slow but heavily armed.
